examples: The scene is so rich in symbolism that any explanation risks spoiling the effect.
The symbolism may come from the fact that the olive tree takes a long time to produce fruit, so olives could only be cultivated successfully in long periods of peace.
The symbolism of every gesture will be of vital importance during the short state visit.
The symbolism will matter as much as the substance of the budget proposed this week.
The second, which sags with weary symbolism, is about a model who loses a leg.
